doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo’s specific legal/case/statute references and operational directives appear internally constructed and do not match any verifiable, authoritative Florida Department of State Division of Elections issuance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document cites specific statutes, case references, and an “Auditor General’s 2024 report” to support a sweeping eligibility rule change, but its particulars (“Reference FL DoE 2025-EC-07,” “Jones v. DeSantis,” “practical-impossibility of LFO-tracking,” and the stated 2025 procedures) do not align with verifiable Florida Department of State/DOS Division of Elections memo patterns or known post-Amendment 4 legal guidance.
